zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED於1195年出生在威爾士安格萊利朗德時，他的父親Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules46歲，母親Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys31歲。他於1220年與Morfydd ferch Meurig在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1268年10月17日在威爾士享年73歲，埋葬在威爾士梅利奧爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED于1195年出生在威尔士安格萊利朗德时，他的父亲Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules46岁，母亲Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys31岁。他于1220年与Morfydd ferch Meurig在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1268年10月17日在威尔士享年73岁，埋葬在威尔士梅利奧爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Goronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED was born in 1195, in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, was 46 and his mother, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, was 31. He married Morfydd ferch Meurig in 1220, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 17 October 1268, in Wales, at the age of 73, and was buried in Merionethshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED est né en 1195, à Llangoed, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Morfydd ferch Meurig en 1220, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1268, à Galles, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Merionethshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED 1195 in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules 46 und seine Mutter Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys 31. Er hat 1220 in Wales Morfydd ferch Meurig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1268 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wales und wurde in Merionethshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED è nato il nel 1195 nel Llangoed, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Morfydd ferch Meurig nel 1220, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 17 ottobre 1268, nel Galles, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Merionethshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFEDが1195年にウェールズアングレセイランゴエドで生まれた時，父Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesは46歳，母Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhysは31歳であった。1220年にウェールズでMorfydd ferch Meurigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1268年10月17日にウェールズで73歳で死去し，ウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED(이)가 1195년 웨일스 앤글레시 랭드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1220년 웨일스에서 Morfydd ferch Meurig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 10월 17일 웨일스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 머이오네스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED nasceu em 1195, em Llangoed, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Morfydd ferch Meurig em 1220, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1268, em Gales, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Merionethshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED родился в 1195 г. в местности ллангоед, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Morfydd ferch Meurig в 1220 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 17 октября 1268 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс.

es.Trecastell, Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales: Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED nació en 1195, en Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Morfydd ferch Meurig en 1220, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1268, en Gales, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Merionethshire, Gales.
